title: Living in Boulder vlog 10 - 29 - 2017: Battles on Timeline to 900.

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog at 3:15am on October 29, 2017 from Boulder. He talks about working on a Wikipedia-based timeline project cataloguing battles with maps and pictures, currently on page 4 of 19, and is approaching 900 YouTube subscribers. He reflects on how long the project might take and the judgment calls involved in sizing maps.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Enjoying the work but it keeps getting sidetracked; difficult to predict how long it will take to finish
Considers doing 500 or 1000 years of timeline entries per day but finds it unrealistic due to the judgment calls required
